query:
-- 修正 active 實例的 current_hp（從 catalog 的 base_hp 取得）
UPDATE roaming_boss_instances ri
JOIN roaming_boss_catalog bc ON ri.catalog_id = bc.id
SET ri.current_hp = bc.base_hp
WHERE ri.status = 'active' AND ri.current_hp <= 0;

-- 清理所有 despawned 狀態的舊實例
DELETE FROM roaming_boss_instances WHERE status = 'despawned';

UPDATE roaming_boss_instances ri
